overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red skirt walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City at night. The character interacts with a street terminal, ascends illuminated stairs through urban plazas, and stops at an outdoor bar while pedestrians and vehicles populate the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban street with cyberpunk terminal

events.description: character crouches to interact with terminal interface
character stands up and begins walking away from terminal

agents.ego_description: character interacts with street terminal, crouching down then standing and walking away

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with glowing interface and yellow accents
illuminated vertical sign reading LIQUOR on building facade
tall cylindrical building with digital advertisements and red neon ring
metal mesh fence separating walkway from building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow rainy urban street at night. The character interacts with a cyberpunk terminal next to a chain-link fence, with a neon liquor sign and futuristic tower visible in the background. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

events.description: character begins ascending illuminated concrete stairs
child in green shirt runs past camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza and ascending wide stairs with integrated lighting

notable_agents.action: child in bright green shirt runs past the camera on the left side

entered.detail: wide stairs with glowing light strips embedded in the risers
modern building with illuminated green-tinted windows
low concrete wall with rectangular cutouts running along walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the terminal through a modern plaza, ascending illuminated concrete stairs. A child in green runs past as the camera follows the character upward, with glass buildings and palm trees visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway past vegetation and modern architecture

entered.detail: raised pedestrian path with wet reflective surface
rectangular planter containing bushes and small trees

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along an elevated walkway lined with concrete planters and vegetation. The path is flanked by modern buildings with neon accents, and digital billboards are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway with seated pedestrians and large advertisement

events.description: character begins ascending second set of wide concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs past people sitting on the steps, then along a darker walkway

notable_agents.action: person sitting on stairs looking at phone
person sitting against wall on upper stairs

entered.detail: broad staircase with integrated lighting where people are sitting
massive screen displaying advertisement with woman's face and text
tall plain concrete wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends another wide staircase where several people are sitting and lounging. A massive digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame. The environment transitions to a darker, more enclosed walkway with a concrete wall on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large trees approaching waterfront road

events.description: character emerges from enclosed walkway into open plaza with large illuminated trees
vehicles become visible driving on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza toward street with traffic, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: adult and child walking together ahead on the path

entered.detail: massive tree with trunk lit by ground lights
spacious open area with wet pavement and scattered trees
paved road with moving vehicles and street lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed walkway, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with a large illuminated tree at its center. The character walks toward a city road where vehicles are driving by, passing other pedestrians including a parent and child.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-side outdoor bar with teal neon lighting

events.description: character stops at outdoor bar counter and turns to face it

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to traffic and stopping at an outdoor bar with teal neon lighting

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: open-air bar with teal neon underlighting and modern design
tall white stools lined up along the bar counter
illuminated signs and screens above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk beside a busy street, approaching an outdoor bar illuminated with distinctive teal neon light. The character stops at the bar counter where a bartender is visible, while vehicles continue to pass by on the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban district that transitions from narrow side streets to a wide, bustling city plaza. It begins with the character interacting with a cyberpunk terminal beside a chain-link fence, where wet pavement reflects the glow of a neon liquor sign and a distant futuristic tower. As the character moves away, the scene opens into a modern plaza, ascending illuminated concrete stairs past a running child and toward glass buildings and palm trees. The camera then follows the character along an elevated walkway lined with vegetation and digital billboards, climbing another wide staircase where people lounge before passing through a darker, enclosed concrete corridor. Finally, the environment expands into a spacious plaza centered around a large illuminated tree, leading the character along a busy road past passing vehicles to an outdoor bar glowing with teal neon light.
